seoTitle: Tingira Heights vs Tinpot — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Tingira Heights and Tinpot. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Tingira Heights vs Tinpot: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Tingira Heights and Tinpot.
heading: Tingira Heights vs Tinpot — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Tingira Heights, New South Wales and Tinpot, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Tinpot has a lower overall climate risk score (35/100) compared to Tingira Heights (39/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Tingira Heights or Tinpot safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Tingira Heights has a flood risk score of 33/100, while Tinpot scores 25/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Tingira Heights scores 51/100 for bushfire risk. Tinpot scores 26/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Tingira Heights or Tinpot?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Tinpot has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.35% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
